chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 322 of 2013 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No.2042/2013. 03.03.2026 Matter is pending since 2013 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 24.04.2015, following order was passed: “24.04.2015 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed, advocate for the applicant. 1. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2-3. At the request of the learned counsel for the applicant, the matter is adjourned to seek instructions as to whether against one order passed by the Appellate Tribunal, two reference can be filed by the department or not?” On 06.11.2020, following order was passed: “06.11.2020 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed, Advocate for applicant. Counsel for the applicant request for adjournment. At his request adjourned.” Even today Mr. Khalid Mahmood Rajpar, advocate has appeared without any power of attorney / instructions. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
